sections.title: Gap 1: `MemoryStateStore.Save` - Concurrent access
Gap 2: `MemoryStateStore.Save` - Overwrite existing
Gap 3: `executeTask` - Idempotency for already-completed task
Gap 4: `executeTask` - Degradable class + dependency error retry path
Gap 5: `Shutdown` - Double shutdown idempotency
Gap 6: `executeHumanTask` - GetCallStatus returns unexpected status
Gap 7: `validateSLA` - Empty string values for numeric fields
Gap 8: `Registry` - Tool registration edge cases
Summary Table
sections.content:
| Package | Gap | Untested Functionality |
|---------|-----|------------------------|
| sharedlayer | 2 | Concurrent access, overwrite existing |
| orchestrator | 3 | Idempotent skip, degradable+dep retry, double shutdown |
| dispatcher | 1 | Unexpected human call status |
| admission | 1 | Empty SLA string values |
| provider | 2 | Registry duplicate reg, unregister not found |

**Total: 9 test gaps identified**
